name: Drought Season Management
description: Manage a 4-zone farm across a 60-day drought season. Water supply is strictly limited. Agent must triage which zones to prioritize when resources run out.

action_schema.action_type: string — one of: irrigate, fertilize, pesticide, harvest, wait, sell
action_schema.amount: float — water litres for irrigate, tons for sell
action_schema.type: string — fertilizer type: nitrogen | phosphorus | potassium
action_schema.days: int — number of days to wait

weather.event: string — rainy | dry | heatwave | normal | frost

grader.description: Scores zone survival rate, water constraint compliance, yield under drought, pest management

constraints.note: Agent must ration water — overuse linearly penalized

success_criteria: Keep at least 3 of 4 zones alive (health > 0.1)
Stay within water budget of 300 litres
Harvest at least 2 zones before season ends
Manage pest risk below 0.5 average across all zones
